title: IT in 2026
narration: Global IT spending in 2026 is approaching five trillion dollars. Software, cloud, and AI infrastructure are where the momentum is.

title: AI acceleration
narration: AI investment is the fastest line on the chart, with roughly forty four percent year over year growth into twenty twenty six.

title: Hybrid shift
narration: Enterprises are moving from cloud first to strategic hybrid, balancing cost, latency, and control.
